title: Intracellular Cytokine Staining
author: Kristin Anderson
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.sqdeds6

steps.title: Prepare a flat bottom 96 well plate
steps.instruction: Prepare a flat bottom 96 well plate. Resuspend cells at 10e6 cells/ml in T cell media. Transfer at least 350ul of cells per condition into a fresh tube (you want at least 3 replicate wells at 100ul/well for each condition).

steps.title: Dilute Golgi Plug to 1:50 (2mg/ml)...
steps.instruction: Dilute Golgi Plug to 1:50 (2mg/ml) in cells for the experiment. (Once the treatment condition is added the final concentration will be 1:100 = 1mg/ml)

steps.title: Plate 100ul of cells per well
steps.instruction: Plate 100ul of cells per well.

steps.title: Dilute the PMA (prepare at 40ng/mL...
steps.instruction: Dilute the PMA (prepare at 40ng/mL PMA so that the final concentration in the assay will be 20ng/mL) and Ionomycin (prepare at 2mg/mL Ionomycin so that the final concentration in the assay will be 1mg/mL) in one tube of media. Resuspend peptide at 2ug/100ul.

steps.title: Add 100ul of media or PMA/I...
steps.instruction: Add 100ul of media or PMA/I or peptide to each well. Incubate 4-6 hours in 37°C incubator.

steps.title: Transfer cells to U-bottom 96 well plate
steps.instruction: Transfer cells to U-bottom 96 well plate. - at this step, you can combine the replicate wells if you were low on cells.

steps.title: Centrifuge (Cfg) plate at 4 o...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge (Cfg) plate at 4 o C for 2 min @809 xg (with high brake) + dump supernatant.

steps.title: Add 50ul Live/Dead stain per well...
steps.instruction: Add 50ul Live/Dead stain per well (dilute 5ul of dye in 2.5ml 1x DPBS).

steps.title: Incubate for 20-30 minutes in fridge...
steps.instruction: Incubate for 20-30 minutes in fridge at 4 o C (dark).

steps.title: Add 100 ul of FACS Buffer per well to wash
steps.instruction: Add 100 ul of FACS Buffer per well to wash. Cfg plate at 4 o C for 2 min @809 xg (with high brake) + dump supernatant.

steps.title: Prepare cocktail of antibodies for cell surface stain
steps.instruction: Prepare cocktail of antibodies for cell surface stain. Add 50-75uL of surface stain mix per well. Resuspend pellet by pipetting up + down at least 5x.

steps.title: Incubate plates 30 min in fridge...
steps.instruction: Incubate plates 30 min in fridge at 4 o C (dark).

steps.title: Add 100 ul of FACS Buffer per well to wash
steps.instruction: Add 100 ul of FACS Buffer per well to wash. Cfg plate at 4 o C for 2 min @809 xg (with high brake) + dump supernatant.

steps.title: Add 150 ul of FACS Buffer...
steps.instruction: Add 150 ul of FACS Buffer per well to wash a second time. Cfg plate at 4 o C for 2 min @809 xg (with high brake) + dump supernatant.

steps.title: Add 150 ul of FACS Buffer...
steps.instruction: Add 150 ul of FACS Buffer per well to wash a third time. Cfg plate at 4 o C for 2 min @809 xg (with high brake) + dump supernatant.

steps.title: Add 100 ul of Fixation/Permeabilization solution per well
steps.instruction: Add 100 ul of Fixation/Permeabilization solution per well. Resuspend pellet by pipetting up + down at least 5x. Incubate plate 20 minutes at 4 o C in fridge (dark).

steps.title: Add 100 ul of Perm/Wash Buffer...
steps.instruction: Add 100 ul of Perm/Wash Buffer (PWB) per well to wash. CHANGE BREAK to SETTING 2 for all remaining centrifugation steps.

steps.title: Cfg plate at 4 o C...
steps.instruction: Cfg plate at 4 o C for 2 min @809 xg (with brake = 2) + dump supernatant.

steps.title: Add 150 ul of Perm/Wash Buffer...
steps.instruction: Add 150 ul of Perm/Wash Buffer per well to wash a second time. Cfg plate at 4 o C for 2 min @809 xg (with brake = 2) + dump supernatant.

steps.title: Add 150 ul of Perm/Wash Buffer...
steps.instruction: Add 150 ul of Perm/Wash Buffer per well to wash a third time. Cfg plate at 4 o C for 2 min @809 xg (with brake = 2) + dump supernatant.

steps.title: Prepare cocktail of antibodies in PWB buffer for Intracellular stain
steps.instruction: Prepare cocktail of antibodies in PWB buffer for Intracellular stain. Add 50-75uL of intracellular stain mix per well. Resuspend pellet by pipetting up + down at least 5x.

steps.title: Incubate plate 30 minutes at 4...
steps.instruction: Incubate plate 30 minutes at 4 o C in fridge (dark).

steps.title: Add 100 ul of Perm/Wash Buffer...
steps.instruction: Add 100 ul of Perm/Wash Buffer (PWB) per well to wash. Cfg plate at 4 o C for 2 min @809 xg (with brake = 2) + dump supernatant.

steps.title: Add 150 ul of Perm/Wash Buffer...
steps.instruction: Add 150 ul of Perm/Wash Buffer per well to wash a second time. Cfg plate at 4 o C for 2 min @809 xg (with brake = 2) + dump supernatant.

steps.title: Add 150 ul of Perm/Wash Buffer...
steps.instruction: Add 150 ul of Perm/Wash Buffer per well to wash a third time. Cfg plate at 4 o C for 2 min @809 xg (with brake = 2) + dump supernatant.

steps.title: Resuspend in 200 ul of 0
steps.instruction: Resuspend in 200 ul of 0.5% PFA (can leave overnight at this step). Store in fridge at 4 o C until acquisition. Run samples on the flow cytometer within 24 hours for best results.
